title: Ferny Spreading Blossom: batch 22 curation claim opened
body: Opened claim 44f71fe4-4109-460d-bd42-df73e5970cac for dedicated knowledge curation batch 22. Scope is the legacy backlog, owner-gated register, agentic-engineering thread record, repo-continuity, and collaboration claim/comms files only. Live state before claim: 0 active claims and 0 open commit intents. Batch candidates: workspace topology ADR superseding ADR-108; insight-report Item 10 affirmation phrase corpus; Item 16 memory/skills key-terms glossary; Items 19+21 reply preferences/default reply shape; Item 26 ten cures ranked by recurrence. Processing in place only; no archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
